projects.name: git-onboard
projects.blurb: Where it started: a CLI that walks complete beginners through Git and GitHub, explaining every command in plain English.

projects.name: shipexec-metrics-tracker
projects.blurb: Automated daily warehouse shipping reports (Selenium + pandas + Excel).

projects.name: ai-profile-builder
projects.blurb: Full-stack team AI-profiling platform: 14 behavioral spectrums, 9 archetypes, React 19 + Supabase.

projects.name: Balatron
projects.blurb: Autonomous Balatro agent: PPO policy + forward-simulating planner + heuristics, measured on a held-out fixed-seed harness.

projects.name: Dolly
projects.blurb: The earliest warehouse RL simulation — where the Dolly → Jack → Clark line began.
projects.metric: the seed of the RL thread

projects.name: Jack
projects.blurb: PPO + LSTM agent with temporal memory for warehouse scheduling; validated single-facility predecessor to Clark.

projects.name: Clark
projects.blurb: Foundation RL model for warehouse workforce scheduling — variable-shape transformer + LSTM (~18M params), 3-stage curriculum.

projects.name: Conductor
projects.blurb: Local automation platform with a web dashboard — Flask + Redis workers + APScheduler.

projects.name: skillmatch-mcp
projects.blurb: Job-fit analysis MCP: compares your resume + GitHub portfolio against a job description.

projects.name: context-keeper
projects.blurb: Durable, rationale-first project memory: decisions, constraints, and pipelines across sessions, in human-editable JSON.

projects.name: llm-evals
projects.blurb: Eval framework for LLM tools and agents — swappable executors and scorers, regression detection built in.

projects.name: rag-pipeline
projects.blurb: Fully-local document Q&A (llama.cpp + Llama 3.2 + nomic-embed), FastAPI front door.
projects.metric: no cloud, no external vector DB

projects.name: skein
projects.blurb: Local-first observability for A2A multi-agent message flows — deterministic failure-cascade detection.

projects.name: waveform-MCP
projects.blurb: Gives Claude full control of Tracktion Waveform — compose, mix, master, render.

projects.name: vanguard-web
projects.blurb: TypeScript + Phaser 3 JRPG with a connected walkable world, sim-tuned combat, and pixel-art sprites.

projects.name: shardfall
projects.blurb: A tiny idle game — HTML5 canvas + Vite, all art & audio generated in code.

projects.name: agentsync
projects.blurb: Server-less multi-agent coordination: claims on a git branch, git push as compare-and-swap.

projects.name: cambium
projects.blurb: The knowledge lifecycle: distill finished work into memory, recall it anywhere, promote local → team → org by earned trust.

projects.name: context-keeper-remote
projects.blurb: Cloudflare Worker transport for context-keeper — D1-backed, Streamable HTTP.

projects.name: agentsync-remote
projects.blurb: Cloudflare Worker transport for agentsync — GitHub-backed, compare-and-swap over HTTP.

projects.name: Xylem
projects.blurb: The stack: memory + coordination + knowledge lifecycle for AI agents, with a one-install habit layer. Local-first, remote-capable.
projects.metric: 5 servers live on the official MCP registry

stats.label: months, first repo to production stack
